name: essentials-claude-code
description: Multi-agent orchestration framework for Claude Code with deep planning, plan optimization with git-style revision tracking, bug investigation, code quality analysis (standard + LSP-powered), issue-based iterative implementation, and parallel file editing/creation capabilities
author: GantisStorm

plugins.name: essentials
plugins.description: Essential agents for Claude Code: planner, plan-optimizer (user-guided refinement), bug-scout, code-quality (standard + Serena LSP), file-editor (edit + create), issue-builder (iterative implementation), and prompt-builder
